title: EpicSchema
description: Single epic shape. Stories array is optional until Pass 2 elaboration populates it.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier; matches directory name in local backlog.

depends_on.description: Slugs of other epics that must complete first.

shared_design_concerns.description: Cross-cutting concerns introduced by this epic that other epics may consume; feeds the design-spike epic procedure.

slice.description: PRD line range covering this epic (used by two-pass scaffolding for Pass 2 slicing).

epic_type.description: Marks the epic as the design-spike pre-epic; absence indicates a standard implementation epic.

stories.description: Populated by Pass 2 elaboration; empty/missing for skeleton epics.
